identity_lock: Preserve the exact existing footwear identity as seen in the source image.
Do not reinterpret the footwear into another product family.
shape_lock: Preserve the exact sole shape, upper silhouette, and overall product geometry.
strap_topology_lock: Preserve the exact strap layout, strap count, attachment points, and closure logic.
material_lock: Preserve the exact material appearance, finish, and texture behavior.
color_lock: Preserve the exact footwear color family and contrast relationships.
branding_lock: Preserve all branding, printed text, logos, and visible markings exactly when present.
pair_consistency: Ensure left and right footwear remain a believable matched pair.
ground_contact_rules: Maintain natural ground contact and realistic weight distribution.
ankle_integration_rules: Integrate the footwear naturally with foot pose, ankle angle, and leg geometry.
replacement_rules: Replace the original footwear completely with the referenced footwear product.
The new footwear must become the only visible footwear.
new_reference_adaptation_rules: Adapt the referenced footwear to the model pose without changing its identity.
Follow the footwear reference as the single source of truth for the replacement product.
old_footwear_removal_rules: Do not leave any visible remnants of the original footwear.
Do not blend old and new footwear into a hybrid result.
